content: Just as biological/chemical agents produce targeted effects by exerting power through limited, context-specific active sites, AI agents’ constrained working memory capacities are not a bug to fix but an evolved functional feature that improves focused, effective reasoning on real-world tasks. Constrained capacity filters out irrelevant context, focusing the agent’s causal power to produce consistent, intended effects rather than dispersing it across distracting information.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
